Features Pricing FAQ Support

Need help?

We're here to help. Reach out and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

support@pinmoji.app
🚨

Report a Problem

Use the in-app report button on any status to flag inappropriate content. We review reports within 24 hours.

🔑

Account Issues

For account deletion, recovery, or billing questions, email us and include the email address associated with your account.

💬

General Questions

Check our FAQ first — most common questions are answered there. If you still need help, send us an email.

Looking for answers? Check our FAQ.
